mentions.note: Terrific growth company in temporary disfavor; periodically sells off when out of favor but not disrupted by AI.
Second-largest US IPO in history; had rough first year post-IPO but became incredible long-term stock starting early 2009. Historical example of patience rewarded.

MACD bullish crossover mid-June; on-balance volume spiking (institutional buying climax). Textbook uptrend. $20B buyback likely to expand. Technical chart suggests $400 by fall. No credit risk (unlike AmEx). Gloved by mutual funds.
